results.title: AI Assistant Phase Execution and HTTP Provider Gateway Pipeline
results.summary: This cluster defines the core AI chat orchestration flow, combining planning-execution logic with terminal escalation handling for unrecoverable errors in the cortex assistant phases. It also includes an AI gateway stack that constructs provider runtime/client configuration, normalizes and preprocesses requests, forwards HTTP calls, resolves provider metadata, and enforces read/timeout/validation behavior for safe request handling. The included Java helper method `InventoryDiscountService.copy` is a low-level stream-copy utility for transferring bytes between input and output streams.

results.title: Cross-API Contract and Client-Service Layer for Accurate Order Operations
results.summary: This cluster bundles API design artifacts spanning HTTP and service-contract layers, including a FastAPI REST template and Java domain models/enums used for voucher and dynamic landing-page sizing payloads. It also includes Accurate service symbols (e.g., `GetSalesInvoice`, `SalesOrderSave`, `VendorSave`, `Webhook`, plus test-oriented service entry points) that describe sales/invoice/vendor/order webhook workflows backed by protobuf definitions. Together, these pieces define a shared integration pattern for building and exercising external-facing APIs with standardized payload structures, method naming, and validation behavior.

results.title: ClickHouse Campaign & Keyword Analytics List Service Pipeline
results.summary: This cluster builds and executes ClickHouse-backed list queries for campaign and keyword reporting, including request normalization, sorting, filtering, and cursor handling for paginated handlers. It maps rows from ClickHouse into API response objects, assembling campaign/keyword items with budgets, status, and derived metrics via shared metric conversion helpers and value extraction utilities. Supporting index builders and request/response helpers tie together service-layer criteria, query execution, and formatted output for both campaign and keyword endpoints.

results.title: Inventory Stock Transfer and Bulk Upload Safety Cohesion
results.summary: This cluster gathers domain helpers and service logic for inventory stock movement workflows, including unique-ID extraction, deduplication, and aggregate stock calculations that support transfer, adjustment, and schedule validation. It also defines transfer request predicates (e.g., rack, expiry-date, and transfer-all changes), status-role checks, and an in-transit rollback publisher used when stock adjustments fail. The accompanying tests exercise schedule comparison, SKU/asset limits, access-role rules, and positive/negative stock-trail creation scenarios for bulk upload/transfer operations.
